Bernat Font Garcia

 Publications Research

Welcome! This is my personal webpage where you can find a summary of my research and interests. I am currently a PhD Candidate of the Aerodynamics and Flight Mechanics group at the University of Southampton (UK) aiming to graduate in 2020.

I research computational fluid dynamics (CFD) and I am mostly focused on turbulence modelling of bluff bodies wakes. Of course, we are currently exploring the possibilities of Machine Learning data-driven models into this field. And results look promising so far!

I am currently based at the Fluid Dynamics group of the Institute of High Performance Computing (Singapore) as part of a collaboration programme between the University of Southampton and the Agency for Science, Technology and Research (A*STAR).

And now, here are some pretty (C)olorful Fluid Dynamics :)
